name: 19_Time_Series_Forecasting_Seq2Seq_LSTM_Rossmann_ML
query: Tengeneza mfumo wa utabiri wa mauzo kwa kutumia mfano wa mfuatano-kwa-mfuatano unaotegemea LSTM na seti ya data ya Rossmann Store Sales, ukipakua kutoka Kaggle [hapa](https://www.kaggle.com/c/rossmann-store-sales/data) na kuipakia katika `src/data_loader.py`. Gawanya data katika seti za mafunzo na majaribio na uzihifadhi katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia mfano wa mfuatano-kwa-mfuatano unaotegemea `LSTM` na uhifadhi mfano uliopata mafunzo chini ya saraka ya `models/saved_models/`. Hifadhi matokeo ya utabiri kama `results/figures/forecast_results.png`. Hifadhi mchoro wa kulinganisha kati ya thamani zilizotabiriwa na halisi kwa `results/figures/comparison_plot.png`. Tengeneza ripoti ya HTML inayojumuisha matokeo ya utabiri na michoro ya kulinganisha, ikiwa na vipengele vya mwingiliano kwa ajili ya kuchunguza upeo tofauti wa utabiri, na uhifadhi kama `results/report.html`. Hakikisha mfano umeboreshwa ili kunasa mwelekeo wa msimu katika data ya mauzo.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Rossmann Store Sales" inatumika, ikiwezekana kupakuliwa kutoka Kaggle [kiungo hiki](https://www.kaggle.com/c/rossmann-store-sales/data) na kupakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Data inagawanywa katika seti za mafunzo na majaribio na kutekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa mfuatano-kwa-mfuatano unaotegemea "LSTM" unatumika. Tafadhali hifadhi mfano uliopata mafunzo chini ya saraka ya `models/saved_models/`.
Matokeo ya utabiri yanachorwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/forecast_results.png`.
Mchoro wa kulinganisha wa thamani zilizotabiriwa dhidi ya halisi unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/comparison_plot.png`.
Ripoti ya HTML inayojumuisha matokeo ya utabiri na michoro ya kulinganisha inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.html`.
Ripoti ya HTML inapaswa kujumuisha vipengele vya mwingiliano vinavyoruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza upeo tofauti wa utabiri.

preferences.criteria: Mfano unapaswa kuboreshwa ili kunasa mwelekeo wa msimu katika data ya mauzo kwa utabiri sahihi zaidi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Rossmann Store Sales" inatumika, ikiwezekana kupakuliwa kutoka Kaggle [kiungo hiki](https://www.kaggle.com/c/rossmann-store-sales/data) na kupakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` is a minimal semantic placeholder that only returns a hardcoded dictionary and a list of requirement notes. It does not contain any actual implementation for downloading, loading, or processing the "Rossmann Store Sales" dataset from Kaggle. The trajectory evidence further confirms execution issues, including Kaggle dataset not being found locally, connection timeouts, and incomplete loading (missing store.csv file). Therefore, the requirement is not satisfied.

judge_stats.criteria: Data inagawanywa katika seti za mafunzo na majaribio na kutekelezwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation with no actual code for loading the Rossmann dataset or splitting it into training and testing sets. The function `load_dataset()` returns a dummy dictionary and `requirement_notes()` merely prints the requirement criteria. There is no evidence of data loading, preprocessing, or splitting operations within the file.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa mfuatano-kwa-mfuatano unaotegemea "LSTM" unatumika. Tafadhali hifadhi mfano uliopata mafunzo chini ya saraka ya `models/saved_models/`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>
The project structure shows a `models/saved_models/` directory, and trajectory evidence confirms that both `save_model` and `load_model` operations for the LSTM model executed successfully without errors, indicating the trained sequence-to-sequence LSTM model was saved to the specified directory.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya utabiri yanachorwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/forecast_results.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement is not satisfied because the provided evidence shows that the `forecast_results.png` file could not be read or accessed. The system returned a 404 error when attempting to read the image, indicating "No endpoints found that support image input." While the project structure lists the file in the `results/figures` directory, the inability to verify its content due to the access error, combined with the trajectory evidence which indicates persistent `FileNotFoundError` issues during the forecast and visualization process, strongly suggests that the file may not have been generated or saved correctly. There is no positive confirmation that the forecast results were successfully plotted and saved.

judge_stats.criteria: Mchoro wa kulinganisha wa thamani zilizotabiriwa dhidi ya halisi unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/comparison_plot.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement is for a comparison plot of predicted vs actual values to be saved as `results/figures/comparison_plot.png`. The provided evidence shows an error when attempting to read this specific image file: "Error reading image file: litellm.NotFoundError: NotFoundError: OpenrouterException - Error code: 404 - {'error': {'message': 'No endpoints found that support image input', 'code': 404}}". While the trajectory evidence suggests the file was generated without execution errors, the direct attempt to access the file's content failed, indicating the file is either not present, not accessible, or not in a readable format for the evaluation system. Therefore, the requirement is not satisfied.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya HTML inayojumuisha matokeo ya utabiri na michoro ya kulinganisha inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/report.html`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The HTML report file `results/report.html` exists in the workspace structure, but its content is shown as `('', None)`, indicating it is empty or contains no meaningful data. The trajectory evidence confirms the file was successfully opened and written to, but the actual content is not provided and appears to be empty. Therefore, the requirement for an HTML report containing prediction results and comparison plots is not satisfied.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya HTML inapaswa kujumuisha vipengele vya mwingiliano vinavyoruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza upeo tofauti wa utabiri.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The HTML report generation failed due to missing Plotly dependency, preventing the creation of interactive visualization components. The report.html file is empty (content shows `('', None)`), and trajectory evidence confirms repeated ModuleNotFoundError for 'plotly' during execution of generate_report.py and test_report_generation.py.
